narrative:
Union North (precinct in Fayette County) has 638 registered voters, with 55.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.5 percentage points.
